CustomField.formula:
IF( AND( SBQQ__ProductCode__c = 'NV86-CH', OR(SBQQ__RequiredBy__r.SBQQ__ProductName__c = 'VECTOR 8600 - SYSTEM 01', SBQQ__RequiredBy__r.SBQQ__ProductName__c = 'VECTOR 8600 - SYSTEM 16'), SBQQ__ProductOption__r.SBQQ__Feature__r.Name = 'Host Unit'), SBQQ__RequiredBy__r.SBQQ__ProductName__c + ' - ' + SBQQ__ProductName__c,
IF( AND( NOT(OR(SBQQ__RequiredBy__r.SBQQ__ProductName__c = 'VECTOR 8600 - SYSTEM 01', SBQQ__RequiredBy__r.SBQQ__ProductName__c = 'VECTOR 8600 - SYSTEM 16')), SBQQ__ProductOption__r.SBQQ__Feature__r.Name = 'Host Unit'), SBQQ__RequiredBy__r.SBQQ__ProductName__c + ' - ' + SBQQ__ProductName__c, SBQQ__ProductName__c))
CustomField.label: CTM Product Name Quote Document
